conbody.p: Overview: An Executive Overview dashboard assists a CDI Director in analyzing the overall performance of the CDI program. The dashboard also helps you group data by week, month, quarter, and year and analyze trends over different time periods and analyze them more easily.

The report provides answers to the following questions.
Has the overall review rate improved over time?
Has the impact clarification rate improved over time?
How is my CMI trending month to month?
How do I pinpoint the root cause of a downward shift in CMI?
Is the CDI program resulting in SOI/ROM category shift?
What is the trend around Reimbursement Impact of the CDI program?
Am I performing above or below my goals?
How do we show the financial impact of the cases post reconciliation?
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Executive Summary Executive Overview

Executive Overview displays the following:.
KPI Cards: Overall CMI Shift, Overall Reimb Impact, Overall Review Rate, Overall -Clarification Rate
Review Rate Chart
Clarification Rate Chart
Provider Response and Agreed Rate Chart
CMI Shift Chart
Reimbursement Impact ($) Chart
SOI/ROM Impact Chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets generated in the tabular chart.
For View By option, refer .
For filters on all pages, refer .
For Footnotes, refer .

Default Display: By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters discharged in the last three calendar months. Click the Reset button to reset the discharge date and select the required date.

row.entry: This metric, by default displays the Overall CMI Shift for inpatient encounters with discharges in the last 9 calendar months.

entry.p: Formula: Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100
Format: 4%, 3% and so on.
This metric displays Overall Reimbursement Impact ($)) ' for the selected period.
Reimbursement Impact for an encounter = (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) * Blended Rate.
entry.note: Total Reimbursement Impact ($) rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Review Rate for the selected period.
Out of total encounters, the percentage of encounters reviewed.
Formula: Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Discharges) x 100.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Format: 96%

row.entry: Encounters with Review Not Needed encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Encounter Clarification Rate for the selected period.
The percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Formula: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED/ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100
Format: 33%

row.entry: Encounters with Review Not Needed encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

conbody.p:
The Review Rate chart displays the Total Encounters, Encounters Reviewed, and Review Rate metrics for each month.
X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020)
Primary Y-axis: Displays the count of encounters.
Secondary Y-axis: Displays the rate.

Text on hover: Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Review Rate Chart Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria(if any) Tooltip
Total Encounters This metric displays the total discharges for the selected 'View By' option. Total Encounters = The total count of encounters that have a Discharge Date/time assigned.
Encounters with Review Not Needed encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.
Encounters Reviewed This metric displays the total reviews for the selected View By option. Encounters Reviewed = The count of encounters with an initial review date/time. Encounters with Review Not Needed encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.
Review Rate This metric displays the percentage of total encounters reviewed for the selected View By option.
Formula: Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Discharges) x 100.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Encounters with Review Not Needed encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.
The Clarification Rate chart displays the Encounter Clarification Rate and Impact Clarification Rate metrics for the selected View By option.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020)

conbody.p: Text on hover: Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.

row.entry: This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the selected View By option.

entry.p: Formula: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED./ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Encounters with Clarifications: Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications: Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Encounters Reviewed: Displays the count of initial reviews.
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters at least one financial impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the selected View By option.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

p.b: Executive Overview - Provider Response and Agreed Rate Chart

fig.title: Provider Response and Agreed Rate Chart

conbody.p:
The Provider Response and Agreed Rate chart displays the Provider Response Rate and Provider Agreed Rate metrics for the selected View By option..
X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020)
Y-axis: Displays the rate.
Text on hover: Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.

table.title: Provider Response and Agreed Rate Metrics

row.entry: This metric displays the percentage of sent clarifications responded by the providers for each View By option.

entry.p: Overall Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Clarifications Sent: Count of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.

Clarifications Responded:Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine.
Clarifications Agreed:
Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed.

row.entry: This metric displays the percentage of responded clarifications agreed by the providers for each View By option.

entry.p: Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

row.entry:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

p.b: Executive Overview - Case Mix Index Chart

conbody.p:
The Case Mix Index chart displays the CMI Before CDI , CMI After CDI, and CMI Shift %' metrics for the selected View By option.
X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020)
Primary Y-axis: Displays the CMI.
Secondary Y-axis: Displays the shift percentage.
Text on hover: CMI metrics are for all the reconciled cases. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

row.entry: Displays the CMI Before CDI value for the selected View by option. .

entry.p: CMI Before CDI = The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters and Reconciliation assessment DRG WT (or Working DRG WT when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria.

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals. E.g., 2.1868

entry.p: CMI Shift: CMI Shift = Overall CMI After CDI - Overall CMI Before CDI

row.entry: Displays the CMI After CDI value for the selected View by option.

entry.p: CMI After CDI= The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 4 decimal places.

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals. E.g. 2.1868.

row.entry: Displays the CMI Shift % value for the selected View by option.

entry.p: CMI Shift % = (The sum of CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria) / (CMI Before CDI for Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-No Impact, , Reconciled-Impact (SOI/ROM Impact) Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria). X 100. (Rounded 2 decimal places.
Format: Line

row.entry: Displays the aggregated value if a particular payer and facility is not selected.

conbody.p:
The Reimbursement Impact chart displays the Reimbursement Impact($) for the selected View By option..
X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020)
Y-axis: Displays the $ value.

Text on hover: Reimbursement Impact $ resulting from the CMI shift (positive or negative) for the cases reconciled with impact. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact.(Impact Type: Financial, Both Impact).

entry.p: This metric displays the Reimbursement Impact for all the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0).

Reimbursement Impact ($) = The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) (CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) x Blended Rate) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0)

p.note: Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters without a shift in the WT (F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT = 0 or F-DRG = R-DRG WT) are not considered in the numerator.

conbody.p:
The SOI/ROM Impact chart displays the '% Cases with SOI Impact' and '% Cases with ROM Impact' for the selected View By option..
X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020, etc.)
Y-axis: Displays the percentage.

Text on hover: Percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI/ROM (SOI/ROM After > SOI/ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

entry.p: This metric displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI (SOI After > SOI Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters.
Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

row.entry: Encounters with status Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, and Auto Reconciled are considered in this metric calculation.

entry.p: Cases with SOI Impact:
The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before.
Cases with ROM Impact.
The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before
#Reconciled
Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

row.entry:
This metric displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the ROM(ROM After > ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

% cases with ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Encounters with status Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, and Auto Reconciled are considered in this metric calculation.

This option is selected by default. When you click this option, Group By and Week Start Day filters automatically become available for selection.
When the Discharge Month option is selected, all the charts in the dashboard display the data by Discharge Month.
Displayed on: X-axis.When the ‘View By’ is Discharge Month, the data in all the charts is sorted by Discharge Month in ascending order.

entry.p: When the Facility option is selected, all the charts in the dashboard display the data by Facility.
When the ‘View By’ is Facility, the data in all the charts is sorted by Facility name in ascending order.
Displayed on: X-axis.
When the Payer option is selected, all the charts in the dashboard display the data by Payer
When the ‘View By’ is Payer, the data in all the charts is sorted by Payer desc in ascending order.
Displayed on: X-axis.

ul.li: You can select date from the lookup provided.
Default: Last 3 calendar months date range selected by default.
With the Reset button, you can reset the discharge date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Discharge Date.
Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that you have access to.
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities you have access to.
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
This filter displays the list of available units.

row.entry:
These options are available only when the View By option is selected as Admit Date/Discharge Date.
See .

ul.li: Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Displays the list of available units.
Displays the list of available admit service.
You can search the Admit Service.
Displays the available patient types.Example: ED, IP, etc.
You can select multiple Visit Type.
You can search the Visit Type.

entry.p:
Displays the available DRG Specialties. Example
You can select multiple specialties
You can search the DRG Specialty.
Default: ALL
Example: Cardiology, Neurology etc.
Total Encounters= Count of inpatient discharges with status other than 'Review Not Needed'.
Encounters Reviewed= Count of encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.
Review Rate= (Encounters Reviewed/ Total Encounters) x 100. E.g. 89%

row.entry: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/ Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)) x100. E.g. 33%

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) ) x 100). E.g. 30%

Provider Response Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine/Count of Clarifications Sent) x100. E.g. 90%
Provider Agreed Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed/Count of Clarifications Responded) x100. E.g. 90%

The avg. of R-DRG WTs (or W-DRG WT if R-DRG is blank) of all Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial Impact) encounters and F-DRG WTs of all Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) and Auto Reconciled encounters.
The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.

entry.p: CMI Shift = (CMI After - CMI Before);
CMI Shift(%)= (CMI After - CMI Before)/CMI Before X 100. E.g. 3.14%

row.entry: Reimbursement Impact ($) = The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) (CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) x Blended Rate) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0).

entry.p: % cases with SOI Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with SOI After > SOI Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100
% cases with ROM Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with ROM After >ROM Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100
